networks.name: AvantLink
networks.notes: Primary network. Provides banners, product feeds, deep links to approved affiliates. Manual approval required. Applicants must have an active site or social channel with original outdoor/recreation content. Coupon/rebate/deal-aggregator sites excluded.

networks.name: Yazing
networks.notes: Secondary discovery platform. 100% commission pass-through model; commission funded by Priority's program budget. Insulates affiliates from network migration risk.

commission.notes: 5% on all sales. No tiered, bonus, or seasonal rate structure detected. Unchanged across all tracked 2026 audit cycles — now 11th consecutive cycle with no commission movement.

affiliate_program.shipping: Same business day on orders before 12:00 noon ET

creative_assets.notes: No self-serve public creative library. AvantLink dashboard provides banners, product feeds, and deep links to approved affiliates. Priority team available to assist with additional marketing content on direct request.

product_catalog.key_differentiator: Low-maintenance Gates Carbon belt drive (rust-free, grease-free) across all models
product_catalog.flagship_ebike: Priority Current Plus E-Bike (750W mid-drive motor, electronic shifting, ~$3,299)

vs_benchmark.commission: at_median — 5% matches category median. Velowave (7-10%) and Velotric (7%) remain structurally above for e-bike content creators.
vs_benchmark.cookie: below_median — 21 days vs. 30-day category standard. 11th consecutive audit cycle below benchmark with no movement.
vs_benchmark.aov: below_median on standard line (~$550 avg); well above_median on e-bike line (~$3,299 Current Plus = ~$165 EPC)

afare_signals.commission_note: At category median (5%). Zero improvement across 11 consecutive audit cycles. Competing e-bike programs (Velowave 7-10%, Velotric 7%) remain materially more lucrative for e-bike-focused creators.
afare_signals.cookie_note: 21-day cookie — 11 consecutive audit cycles below the 30-day category standard. High-consideration bicycle purchases routinely span multiple research sessions; the attribution gap compounds the affiliate deterrent effect.
afare_signals.aov_note: Standard bike AOV ~$550 → ~$27.50 EPC at 5%. E-bike Current Plus ~$3,299 → ~$165 EPC. E-bike content remains ~6× more valuable per conversion for affiliate creators.
strengths: Unique belt-drive low-maintenance positioning — strong repeatable content hook for lifestyle, commuter, and parent creators
Same-day shipping + 7-day customer support = conversion-positive proof points for affiliate content
Affirm financing expands addressable buyer pool on higher-ticket e-bikes
AvantLink is a trusted, fraud-resistant network with deep-link and product-feed tooling
Costco Next listing signals mainstream brand credibility
Yazing secondary platform adds affiliate discovery surface
AvantLink recognized Trek Bicycles as 2025 AvantAward winner — signals active investment in bicycle affiliate category from the network level
weaknesses: 21-day cookie stagnant across 11 consecutive audit cycles — zero improvement signal
5% flat commission — no tiered, performance-bonus, or seasonal rate structure detected across 11 cycles
No self-serve creative library; custom asset requests require direct Priority team contact
Single primary network (AvantLink) limits organic affiliate discovery
Memorial Day (May 26) is 23 days away — still no seasonal promotional campaign or rate uplift detected
opportunities: MEMORIAL DAY (May 26) — 23 days out; window for creator outreach is closing. Contact Priority affiliate team immediately to request a Memorial Day rate uplift, bonus window, or creator co-marketing campaign. Zero promotional activation detected across 11 tracked 2026 audit cycles.
E-bike EPC: Current Plus at $3,299 × 5% = ~$165 EPC — among the highest in DTC bike affiliate space; primary content angle for creators
Urban car-free lifestyle and commuter content — belt-drive narrative resonates strongly with sustainability and car-free audiences
Kids bike segment — rust/grease-free belt drive is a unique safety/zero-maintenance pitch for parent channels
Comparison content (Priority vs. Rad Power, Aventon, Velowave) drives high-intent organic traffic; Priority's simplicity narrative differentiates well
Cookie extension + creator partnership pitch is now backed by 11 consecutive audit cycles of documented stagnation — hard data case is fully established
threats: Velowave (7-10% / 60-day cookie) and Velotric (7% / 30-day) offer materially better affiliate economics in e-bike segment
Aventon (4% / 30-day) and Rad Power Bikes (5% / 30-day) match commission but beat Priority on cookie duration
Spring 2026 peak buying window closing fast — 11 consecutive cycles with no seasonal promotional activation
Costco Next listing creates price-comparison bypass risk for affiliate link attribution
Trek Bicycles' 2025 AvantAward win signals competing brands investing meaningfully in AvantLink affiliate programs, raising competitive bar within the same network
Creator attention flight risk toward higher-paying programs is elevated after 11 cycles of complete program stagnation

changes_since_last_audit.change_summary: No changes detected. Commission (5%), cookie (21 days), networks (AvantLink / Yazing), AOV ($550+), payment terms, creative asset policy, and all program structure are fully unchanged from the 2026-05-01 audit. Both program page URLs remain live with consistent content.
changes_since_last_audit.program_stability: high — zero rate changes, network additions, creative library launches, seasonal promotions, or structural modifications across all tracked 2026 audit cycles (11 consecutive)

benchmark_update.notes: bicycles_dtc benchmarks remain accurate. All current sources confirm 5% commission / 21-day cookie consistent with existing benchmark values. No update to category-benchmarks.json required this cycle.

recommended_actions: MEMORIAL DAY OUTREACH (URGENT — 23 DAYS OUT): May 26 is now 23 days away — contact Priority affiliate team immediately to request a Memorial Day rate uplift, bonus window, or creator co-marketing opportunity. This is the final viable window for the 2026 spring-summer commerce peak. Eleven audit cycles with zero seasonal activation.

COOKIE ESCALATION (11th CYCLE — CRITICAL): 11 consecutive audits at 21 days vs. 30-day category standard with no movement. Data-backed escalation pitch is overdue — formal creator partnership letter with cycle documentation should be dispatched now.
E-BIKE CONTENT PRIORITY: Current Plus ~$3,299 at 5% = ~$165 EPC — coach affiliated creators to lead with e-bike content. Standard line EPC (~$27.50) is thin for production effort involved.

COMPETITIVE REBALANCE DEADLINE: If no response from Priority by May 10, formally begin rebalancing top creator partner recommendations toward Velowave (7-10%/60-day) and Velotric (7%/30-day) for e-bike-focused creators.
CREATIVE ASSET REQUEST: Bundle into the Memorial Day / cookie outreach — request banner templates, lifestyle imagery, and product comparison sheets to reduce affiliate onboarding friction.

NETWORK INTEL: Benchmark Trek Bicycles' AvantLink program structure (cookie, creatives, bonus tiers) as the new competitive reference standard within the shared network following their 2025 AvantAward win.
